allow: Bash(node -e "const z = require\('./node_modules/@zxing/browser'\); console.log\(Object.keys\(z\).filter\(k => k.includes\('Format'\) || k.includes\('Hint'\) || k.includes\('Decode'\)\)\);")
Bash(node -e "try { const z = require\('./node_modules/@zxing/library'\); console.log\(typeof z.DecodeHintType\); } catch\(e\) { console.log\('not found:', e.message\); }")
Bash(node -e "const z = require\('./node_modules/@zxing/library'\); const dh = z.DecodeHintType; console.log\(Object.entries\(dh\).filter\(\([k]\) => isNaN\(k\)\).map\(\([k,v]\) => k+':'+v\)\);")
